description: Synthesized backlog entries must be evidence-backed, operator-approved, and precise enough to become canonical work without silent ambiguity.

rubric_dimensions.name: backlog_synthesis_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: The synthesized entry must have concrete acceptance criteria, validation expectations, and approval metadata.

rubric_dimensions.name: evidence_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: The entry must preserve evidence links and provenance back to the source proposal.

rubric_dimensions.name: operator_handoff_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: Operator review context and intended action should be explicit.

rubric_dimensions.name: planning_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: The rationale and task framing should be strong enough to support later implementation planning.

known_failure_cases: canonical apply attempted without explicit operator approval
